description: PR4 scenario #2A — prayer-rule divergence: configured-windows rule rejects a slot the legacy _start_is_blocked filter permits. A candidate on the exception day at 13:00–14:15 should be rejected by the configured Thursday prayer window (12:30–13:45) but would pass the hardcoded 11:35–12:59 legacy filter. The commit-4 divergence report records this as a 'configured \ legacy' case.
notes: Commit 4 turns this fixture into numeric rows in the divergence report (a)/(b)/(c). No removal yet.
This is a 'configured kills, legacy permits' case — proves the legacy filter is not a superset of the configured rule.
